name: ACE Cash Express
description_short: Seffner, FL's ACE Cash Express at 11200 E M.L.K. Jr Blvd offers payday loans, title loans, and check cashing services.
description_long:
ACE Cash Express in Seffner, FL is located at 11200 E M.L.K. Jr Blvd, Suite 108, serving the Seffner area as a standalone storefront. Open Monday through Thursday from 10AM to 7PM, Friday 9AM to 8PM, and Saturday 9AM to 5PM (closed Sundays), this location provides convenient access to quick cash services for Seffner residents needing immediate funds.

At this Seffner location, ACE Cash Express offers payday loans, title loans, and check cashing services. You can reach the store at +1 813-661-0602 to ask about loan amounts, terms, and current rates. The friendly staff can help you understand your options and get approved quickly.

Whether you need emergency cash before payday or have an unexpected expense in Seffner, FL, ACE Cash Express is open early and late to accommodate your schedule. Bring a valid ID, recent pay stub, and proof of address to apply. Visit the E M.L.K. Jr Blvd location today for fast, straightforward lending.
address: 11200 E M.L.K. Jr Blvd #108, Seffner, FL 33584

company_info.headquarters: 11200 E M.L.K. Jr Blvd #108, Seffner, FL 33584

pros: Multiple service offerings under one provider: installment loans, title loans, check cashing, bill payments, money transfers, and tax services
Online loan platform available for remote applications and funding
Same-day or next-day funding capability for emergency cash needs
Physical store locations allow in-person service and relationship building with local branches
Dedicated customer service with separate phone lines for general inquiries (877-ACE-CASH) and online operations (866-ACE-CASH)
Title loan option allows borrowers with poor credit to leverage vehicle equity
Bill payment and money transfer services integrated with lending products
cons: Product availability is severely restricted by state—website confirms certain loan types are unavailable in specific states, requiring customers to verify eligibility before applying
As an emergency-cash lender, APR and fees are substantially higher than traditional bank loans, creating expensive debt cycles for consumers relying on repeat borrowing
Website navigation appears broken or outdated, with 404 errors on location-specific pages and references to Hurricane Ida closures that suggest content maintenance issues
Limited transparency on the landing pages regarding rates, terms, and actual APR figures—customers must contact company directly or search for rate disclosure
No mention of credit-building features or alternatives; positions itself as a high-cost lender rather than a credit-improvement tool
best_for: Consumers facing immediate emergency expenses who need same-day or next-day cash and lack access to traditional bank loans
Vehicle owners with poor credit seeking collateral-based loans through title lending products
Unbanked and underbanked consumers who need check cashing, bill payment, and money transfer services bundled together
Small business owners seeking quick access to capital without traditional SBA loan requirements
diagnosis: ACE Cash Express is best suited for consumers with immediate cash needs who have limited access to traditional bank credit and can afford higher-cost borrowing, particularly those with vehicles who might qualify for title loans. The primary caveat is that ACE's product availability varies significantly by state, and consumers must verify their specific state's regulations before applying; additionally, the high-cost nature of these loans makes them a short-term solution only and unsuitable for long-term financial planning.
meta_description: ACE Cash Express at 11200 E M.L.K. Jr Blvd, Seffner, FL. Fast payday and title loans with quick approval.
